steps.title: Identify the initial amount
steps.content: The table starts at $867$, so the initial amount in the account is $867$ dollars.

steps.title: Use the growth multiplier
steps.content: The values increase by $0.4\%$ each year. A $0.4\%$ increase means multiplying by $1+0.004$ each year.

steps.title: Build the exponential model
steps.content: Using $t$ for years and $n$ for dollars, the model is $$n=867(1+0.004)^t$$The answer is B.
